properties.displayName: Require tag with allowed values on resources
properties.description: Enforces that a specified tag exists on resources and has one of the allowed values. Can be assigned multiple times with different tag names and values.

metadata.description: Name of the tag to enforce (e.g., 'Department', 'Environment')
List of allowed values for the tag (e.g., ['Finance', 'Engineering'] or ['Dev', 'Test', 'Prod'])
